label: base-character
prompt: Sofia, an energetic, friendly, expressive 28-year-old Latina woman with a hustler vibe, a freelancer and rideshare driver. Dark hair worn loose or pulled back, lively eyes, a ready grin, natural skin texture with light makeup. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual tee or zip hoodie, no logos or graphics. Hyper-realistic photograph with super-detailed true-to-life skin texture: visible pores, fine lines, subtle natural blemishes and freckles, slight uneven skin tone and natural imperfections, not airbrushed and not too perfect. Natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.
